nasb.text: ‘Now this is the law of the Nazirite when the days of his separation are fulfilled, he shall bring the offering to the doorway of the tent of meeting.

esv.text: “And this is the law for the Nazirite, when the time of his separation has been completed: he shall be brought to the entrance of the tent of meeting,

cnv.text: “‘拿細耳人的律例是這樣：離俗的人的日子滿了那天，人要把他帶到會幕的門口；

ccb.text: “献给耶和华的日子期满后，拿细耳人要遵行以下条例。他要被带到会幕门口，
